{{Infobox character
| name = Seliethin
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Seliethin]] is a bluish, hairless, six-eyed creature that can run like an ape.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Seliethin]] has three sets of eyes: one pair blue, one white, and one green.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Seliethin]] has thick, three-fingered hands.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Seliethin]] is a blue ape with six eyes.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
